---
title: "Media"
pagetitle: "Media — Martin Lukk"
subtitle: "Press, podcasts, and other public-facing appearances."
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  exclude:
    filename: "index.qmd"
  type: custom
  template: ../_templates/news-item.ejs
  sort: "date desc"
  page-size: 50
  fields: [date, title, outlet]
---

::: {#listing-listing}
:::
